title: aleuritia pinnata
intro: Aleuritia pinnata, also known as the Indian pennywort or gotu kola, is a type of perennial herb native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and neuroprotective effects. The health benefits of Aleuritia pinnata include improving cognitive function, reducing anxiety and stress, and enhancing skin health. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
